rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ELIZABETH MARY CASTAGNOLI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. No petition for final distribution or second report of status of administration with a request for additional time has been filed yet, as required by Probate Code Section 12200 and as ordered on 3/11/25. No Final I&A has been filed yet as required to be done within four months after Letters are first issued to a general personal representative. [Prob. C. Sect. 8800(b).] Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CRAIG RUSSELL KEITH
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/14/2025. Issue necessitating continuance: an additional hard copy of the lost will must be provided to the clerk for a will file to be created before the hearing to admit the lost will to probate (LRSF 14.20). Please lodge the copy of the lost will with the court no later than 09/30/2025 to avoid additional continuance).

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DANILO PILAR QUIAZON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 09/30/2025. Issue necessitating a continuance: for a petition to probate a foreign will, a certified copy of the will must be submitted without a pleading cover sheet to the clerk for a will file to be created, and a certified copy of the order or decree admitting it to probate outside of this jurisdiction must be filed separately and conventionally with a pleading cover sheet attached (i.e., not e-filed) (LRSF 14.22). Please lodge the certified copy of the will with the court no later than 09/16/2025 to avoid further continuance.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR. Dismissed by Petitioner as filed in the wrong venue, although Decedent reportedly died in San Francisco and owned real property here.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/29/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proof of publication has been filed yet. (Item 1 of the petition is also incomplete.) (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (3) Item 2 of the Acknowledgment of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities is incomplete (no telephone number). (4) If the petitioner is the trustee of the devisee trust, all beneficiaries of the trust must be listed in item 8 of the petition and must be clearly identified as such. (5) "Successor Co-executor" is not a relationship to the decedent. A person is either related as kin or is a stranger. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 10/15/25. (A supplement, signed and verified by the petitioner, should suffice to address the issues with the petition. A new proof of service of Notice of Petition to Administer Estate with the instructions for how to appear remotely attached to it and a new, complete Acknowledgment of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities must be filed.) Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
